description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in formal attire, featuring a tailored suit jacket with a high collar, a buttoned vest, and a collared shirt underneath. The figure's hands are relaxed at the sides, and the posture is upright and confident. The suit is complemented by formal trousers and dress shoes, giving the appearance of a business professional or someone attending a formal event. The facial features are stern, with neatly styled short hair and no visible facial hair. The clothing appears fitted and well-maintained, with subtle detailing on the cuffs and lapels. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is clean and composed.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a tailored suit, vest, and collared shirt, standing upright with a composed demeanor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suit jacket, vest, collared shirt, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, high collar, and fitted trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit jacket, straight posture, and neatly styled hair.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm position, and side details of the suit.
attribute_clothing_type: formal business suit with a collared shirt and buttoned vest
